Quality Education.reason: The course is an advanced seminar for master's and doctoral students, directly aligning with tertiary education (Target 4.3) and developing professional legal skills (Target 4.4). Model B's original reasoning is most comprehensive.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's core competency of 'social participation and humane care' combined with the nature of administrative law (which often addresses fairness and non-discrimination in public services) provides a plausible, albeit weak, inferred link to Target 10.3.
